programme.title: Spitfire
programme.desc: The story of the British single-seat fighter plane the Supermarine Spitfire, designed by RJ Mitchell and famous for its role in the Battle of Britain. Archive footage, new film of the aircraft in flight and interviews with the last surviving veterans who flew the plane in combat combine to tell its story.

programme.title: Brazil 2002
programme.desc: Documentary following the Brazilian national team through the 2002 World Cup, which culminated in the country's fifth victory in the tournament.

programme.title: My Icon: Chris Hughton
programme.desc: The football manager speaks about the people that inspired his career.

programme.title: I Am Patrick Swayze
programme.desc: A tribute to the American actor, known for his roles in hits like Dirty Dancing, Ghost and The Outsiders. With contributions by Demi Moore and Rob Lowe among others.

programme.title: Val
programme.desc: Documentary focusing on the daily life of actor Val Kilmer, featuring never-before-seen footage spanning 40 years.

programme.title: Busby
programme.desc: A profile of former Manchester United manager Matt Busby, who transformed football through a career of great talent and tragedy. Featuring previously unseen archive footage and interviews with those who knew the man best.

programme.title: Lennox: The Untold Story
programme.desc: The incredible story of Lennox Lewis, who rose from humble beginnings in London's West Ham to become regarded as one of the greatest heavyweight boxers of all time.

programme.title: Man on Wire
programme.desc: Oscar-winning documentary about French street performer Philippe Petit. In 1974 he undertook a daring 45-minute tightrope walk and acrobatic routine on a wire stretched between the two towers of the World Trade Centre. Featuring re-creations of his earlier stunts at Paris's Notre Dame cathedral and Sydney Harbour Bridge.

programme.title: Discovering: Sean Connery
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of the Scottish actor, who rose to fame as the original screen James Bond and won an Oscar for his role in The Untouchables.

programme.title: Discovering: Susan Sarandon
programme.desc: A profile of the American actress, who starred in The Witches of Eastwick, Thelma & Louise and Bull Durham and won an Academy Award for her role in Dead Man Walking.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of director Ridley Scott, whose films include Alien, Blade Runner, Thelma & Louise, Gladiator, Prometheus, The Martian and Hannibal.

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of Steven Spielberg, whose films include Jaws, ET the Extra-Terrestrial, Raiders of the Lost Ark and Jurassic Park and who won Oscars for directing Schindler's List and Saving Private Ryan.

programme.title: On the Line: The Richard Williams Story
programme.desc: Featuring newly uncovered interviews spanning the 1980s to now, Richard Williams - the father of tennis stars Venus and Serena - retraces his family's journey from the poverty-stricken streets of Shreveport, Louisiana, to the grass courts of Wimbledon.

programme.title: My Icon: Heather Watson

programme.title: Rise of the Superheroes

programme.title: I Am Luke Perry
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the life and career of the actor, who rose from obscurity to become a 1990s heart-throb and pop culture icon. With contributions from Stephen Baldwin, John McNaughton, Jason Priestley, Marisol Nichols and Gabriel Correa.

programme.title: Benetton Formula
programme.desc: The history of the Formula 1 team led by Alessandro Benetton, told through the memories of its key members and archive footage.

programme.title: My Mom Jayne
programme.desc: Actress Mariska Hargitay explores the life of her mother Jayne Mansfield, who died in a car accident at the age of 34 when Mariska was only three years old. programme.title: The Alien Autopsy Scandal
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the story of two music entrepreneurs in the mid-1990s who claimed to have unearthed top-secret footage showing the corpse of an alien recovered from a 1947 crash site near Roswell, New Mexico. They set out to show it to the world, but first they had to find the money to buy it from the ex-military cameraman who holds the film reels.

programme.title: Bowie: The Man Who Changed the World
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the life and career of the musician, combining footage from interviews with the man himself and contributions from those who knew him personally.

programme.title: One to One: John & Yoko
programme.desc: Documentary examining the 18 months that John Lennon and Yoko Ono spent living in Greenwich Village in New York City in the early 1970s, featuring restored footage of Lennon's only full-length, post-Beatles concert.

programme.title: Life's Journey
programme.desc: Every species on Earth faces the challenge of raising the next generation. In the wild, only the strongest will win at nature's mating game.

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: The broadcaster explores the ways different creatures hear and produce sound and how it can influence their decisions, using cutting-edge audio technology to reveal a new perspective and understanding of animal behaviour.

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: From melodic songs to strange hums, David Attenborough shares the sounds that gibbons, lyrebirds, bull elk and more use to find a mate - and warn off the competition.

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A look at how baby animals communicate in their quest for survival, using sound to beg and call for help in the early days of life.

programme.title: Jaguar Journals
programme.desc: The documentary follows Fera as she teaches her rambunctious cub Simba how to climb trees and hunt for dinner.

programme.title: Shark Squad
programme.desc: The work of a team trying to unlock shark secrets in the Bahamas, including their sociability, their bravery and where they give birth. The answers may help protect them.

programme.title: Wild Philippines
programme.desc: Discovering a world shaped by fire and water, as cameras capture Philippine eagles soaring above ancient forests and rare crocodiles lurking below the river's surface.

programme.title: Wild Philippines

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Hermit Crab

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: Dr Marty and the MMR team rush to save a massive sea lion caught in a plastic noose, and an orphaned baby sea otter gets adopted into a new family.

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: The rescue team tries to save an otter as Dr Marty battles rough conditions to help an entangled sea lion. At the Rescue Centre, a mischievous seal pup puts himself in danger.

programme.title: Wild Pacific Rescue
programme.desc: The MMR team helps a lost sea turtle get back home. A huge sea lion is found shot with a crossbow bolt, and Dr Marty helps a fruit bat cope with old age.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: A look at some of the Earth's imaginative animals, exploring how creativity enables problem-solving skills and drives forward adaptations that are essential for survival.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: Exploring the lives of some adept eaters, this editions looks at the unusual strategies these animals have developed to thrive in their unique environments.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: Exploring the importance of shared knowledge and group dynamics, these seemingly antisocial animals all benefit from having 'mates'.

programme.title: Extraordinary Animals
programme.desc: A look at how, for certain groups of animals, being devoted means putting the lives of their offspring first and going to extreme lengths to ensure their survival.

programme.title: Bugs That Ruled the World
programme.desc: Exploring how the praying mantis has the agility of a martial artist and an appetite for everything from flies to hummingbirds.

programme.title: Bugs That Ruled the World

programme.title: Airborne
programme.desc: Examining how airborne creatures navigate the skies, with some routes being short and others across hundreds of miles.

programme.title: Bears of the Karawank Mountains
programme.desc: Documentary following a young male brown bear on his adventures in a mountain range that forms a natural border between Slovenia and Austria.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: The creatures that live in the ocean's darkest depths and the skills they have built over the years, from blind worms who fish to crabs who climb trees and more.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Building Italy
programme.desc: The Maine Cabin Masters want to test their skills in Italy; Chase, Sarah and their four children set out house hunting in the remote Italian countryside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Building Italy
programme.desc: Chase, Sarah, Ashley and Ryan have arrived in Italy for the long haul; they need to work with the locals to demolish the house and complete their first big project before the kids arrive - these kids will need a working bathroom.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Building Italy
programme.desc: Chase has two big projects to juggle; the kids have big ideas for their four bedrooms on the second floor, while the basement has walls needing demolition and new floors that need to be poured if he's to keep on schedule for the future family room.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Building Italy
programme.desc: The cabin masters and Morrill family take on their most ambitious project yet; Chase discovers local stoneworkers; he embraces the kids' artistic side; guests from Maine arrive to lend a hand.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Building Italy
programme.desc: Even with Ashley, Ryan and Jedi to help, Chase and family have a ton of work to do to turn their walkout basement into a family room complete with a new bathroom; only Chase could find a second life for old animal troughs.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Building Italy
programme.desc: With two weeks left and a ton of work remaining, including exteriors, roofing, decking, landscaping and a missing bedroom, Chase, Ashley, Ryan, Sarah and the kids have to rally to finish the house.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple hopes to escape their busy LA lives with a quiet vacation home along Lake Tuscaloosa; they find a property with great potential and are ready to take on the renovations, but it may prove to be more work than expected.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Two brothers and their wives look for the perfect vacation home in Door County, Wisconsin, for their extended family of 30.

programme.desc: A military family known for frequently relocating is looking for a lakefront property to act as a constant to keep them grounded; their waterfront getaway will be a spot where the kids can grow up making memories out on the water.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines go big with their next project to revive a lake house estate stuck in the 1960s; Chip tackles major structural room shifts to accommodate Jo's blend of two very different design styles.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Chip and Jo come up with ways to highlight the outdoors in the living space and make it a feature of Jo's mid-century modern and Spanish revival design, as well as maximize the cliffside view of the property.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Chip and Jo focus on custom millwork projects designed to reinvigorate the home's mid-century modern character in nearly every room of the house; Chip and Jo also decide to add a water feature to the outdoor courtyard.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Chip and Jo merge mid-century modern and Spanish revival design styles with custom metal and plaster texture in the primary bath and volcanic ash floor tile in the recreation room; Jo questions a decision about copper gutters.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Chip wraps up construction and Jo starts styling the house; Jo plans a big surprise for Chip on reveal day; special guests Tim Tebow and Robert Griffin III.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
